title: SPORTS|SJA: WVT Secures Day 𝟏 of Tanay Cluster Pr
content:
SPORTS|SJA: WVT Secures Day 𝟏 of Tanay Cluster Pre-Games, 𝟏-𝟏

St. Jerome’s Academy (SJA) Women’s Volleyball Team wrapped up the first day of the 3rd MaPSA Antipolo Tanay Cluster Pre-Games with a 1-1 record. Although they suffered a loss in their opening match, the team remained undeterred and fought back to finish the day strong.

Disappointment filled the court as SJA endured their first defeat against St. Joseph Parish School (SJPS), falling with a wide margin, 11-25.

Despite the early setback, SJA continued to push forward, dominating the first set against San Ildefonso College (SIC) and maintaining their momentum in a tightly contested second set. With determination and teamwork, they sealed the win with a 25-23 victory.

: Noah Cyrus G. Sarsaba

: Trizhia Jertine Bilog & Mharienne Zenn D.J. Clerigo,

: Angelica Jemiel B. Jatulan

For more pictures, kindly open the link below:
